programme.title: Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage
programme.sub-title: A Country Club, a Yokel and a New Boss
programme.desc: Georgie's plan to make new clients at the local country club backfires when its outdated policies upset Audrey; Mandy struggles to prove herself at work.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When a promising opportunity to save Woodstone is threatened by a personal conflict, Sam and Jay are forced into a difficult choice.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The team confronts an unexpected final hurdle they need to overcome to bring Senior to justice for his role in the Wellbrexa cover-up; the team defends an airport ramp operator accused of safety negligence in the death of a passenger.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Mornings
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.desc: Travel expert Erin Florio; actress Ellen Burstyn.

programme.desc: Costumed contestants compete for cash and prizes.

programme.desc: Participants must guess the prices of different types of items, ranging from vehicles to electronic appliances, to win a prize.

programme.title: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Victor makes Phyllis a deal she can't refuse; Adam pushes Riza to come clean; Sharon and Noah are ambushed in Vegas.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Chelsea questions Bill about Hayley; Dani and Naomi comfort each other; Jan's presence stresses Ashley out; Nicole and Carlton reconcile just as Kia swings by; Vanessa makes herself at home in Joey's condo.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Sunny Anderson are joining Drew for the news and Val is telling Drew about her Lifetime movie. Claire Wadsworth and Nikki Hill are in the kitchen for some cooking with Drew!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jill Kargman tells Drew about her new movie "Influenced.".

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: The Tattoo Artist's Apprentice; Casanova Dodges Payback?
programme.desc: A tattoo artist resists returning an apprenticeship fee, saying the apprentice was a slacker; a man accused of having a secret girlfriend is sued by his ex for repayment of a loan.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: When Ex-Girlfriends Fight!; Burning Down the Condo!
programme.desc: A woman says she had to bathe at a restaurant and sleep in a car after her ex locked her out; a landlady blames her tenant for a fire in his condo, but he passes the buck on to his friend, who was smoking a cigar.

programme.title: Sheriff Country
programme.desc: While Skye celebrates her 24th birthday, Sheriff Mickey Fox investigates a brutal attack tied to a land-grab scheme.

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: Bode sets out to prove his leadership skills during a historic cold snap that plunges Edgewater into crisis mode; Jake contemplates a life-altering decision that could change his future forever.

programme.title: Boston Blue
programme.desc: When a crisis erupts at a local hospital over a critical transplant error, Danny and Lena work to calm a volatile situation; an unexpected encounter pushes Lena to reflect on her past.

programme.title: CBS LA at 11pm
programme.desc: Join the CBS LA team for stories from communities around SoCal, breaking news from The Desk, and NEXT Weather from the Weathersphere.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. Joining Colbert is his bandleader, Julliard-trained Jon Batiste, and house band Stay Human. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show.".

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: CBS Saturday Morning
programme.desc: Each Saturday morning, Adriana Diaz and Kelly O'Grady report on the week's top stories; the broadcast, known for its signature segments The Dish and Saturday Sessions, offers insightful conversations with artists, authors, chefs and musicians.

programme.title: Lucky Dog: Reunions
programme.desc: Brandon reunites with two adopters whose dogs were trained to join them in their kid-centric work environments.

programme.title: Lucky Dog: Down Under
programme.desc: A timid terrier-kelpie mix meets a loving couple hoping to complete their family; a frightened chihuahua might be the perfect companion for a woman healing from loss; a resilient staffie could finally find its forever home.

programme.title: Mission Unstoppable
programme.sub-title: Chemistry of Neon, Concussions, and Computer Engineering
programme.desc: The science behind creating neon signs; the tools one needs to do paleontology fieldwork; how one's brain reacts to pain; a computer engineer working with AI.

programme.title: The Visioneers With Zay Harding
programme.sub-title: A Sea of Hope and Wonder
programme.desc: A young girl's marine mission; the world of robotic fish; bringing conservation straight to the classroom.

programme.title: Live: NWSL Soccer
programme.desc: The Gotham FC hosts the Bay FC for a regular-season NWSL matchup at Red Bull Arena in New Jersey. Both teams enter this fixture in the bottom half of the NWSL table, looking to close the gap on the top eight. Esther González leads Gotham with 1 goal.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Moving Day continues at the New Orleans doubles tournament in TPC Louisiana. The 33 teams that made the cut compete in fourball to determine the leaderboard for tomorrow's final round. Winning partners each earn 400 FedExCup points in the finals.

programme.title: Game Time With Boomer Esiason
programme.desc: The former NFL quarterback interviews compelling figures in the sports and entertainment industries.

programme.title: Marshals
